translationGuide.pageSubtitle: Follow these steps to translate text directly on pages or from the translations editor in Settings. Each step includes an illustration.
translationGuide.step1Body: In the top bar, open the language menu and pick English, French, or Turkish. Inline translation requires a non-Arabic locale.
translationGuide.step1Tip: Arabic is the reference language shown for context.
translationGuide.step2Body: Click the language button on the screen edge (left side). Navigation is locked until you finish.
translationGuide.step2Tip: A hint bar appears above the page content while the mode is active.
translationGuide.step3Body: Click any Arabic label on the current page — it becomes an input. Type the translation in the selected language.
translationGuide.step3Tip: Changes auto-save when you leave the field or press Enter.
translationGuide.step4Body: Click the save 💾 edge button again to flush all changes and exit translation mode.
translationGuide.step4Tip: Do not navigate away before saving — links are blocked on purpose.
translationGuide.step5Body: Settings → UI translations: search any string and edit in the Arabic | English | target language columns.
translationGuide.step5Tip: Use «Jump to section» — the selected section header turns blue.
translationGuide.dontShowAgain: Do not show this guide on startup
translationGuide.reopenHint: You can reopen the guide anytime at
